metadata.description: Claude Code skills and rules for self-improving workflows -- feedback loops, learning tools, and creative comparison

plugins.name: feedback
plugins.description: A workflow mirror. 5/5/5 reports that track what's improving, escalate what isn't, and turn repeat advice into automation

plugins.name: skill-battle
plugins.description: A cage match for ideas -- run multiple skills on the same task in parallel and compare outputs side by side

plugins.name: eli5
plugins.description: Simple, visual, concrete explanations for adults who want the aha moment without the jargon. Research-backed, opens in your browser
